name: First Industrial Realty Trust, Inc.
description: First Industrial Realty Trust, Inc. is a leading fully integrated owner, operator, and developer of industrial real estate. The company owns, manages, acquires, sells, and develops high-quality industrial facilities, including light industrial, R&D, distribution, and warehouse properties, located in major metropolitan markets across the United States. First Industrial helps its customers manage their supply chains through its diverse portfolio and experienced team.
